explanationTarget: Ishlar o‘tishga imkon bergandagina harakatlaning. Bir tomonlama ko‘chada faqat bitta yo‘nalishda yurishga ruxsat beriladi. Qayrilib burilish yoki orqaga yurish mumkin emas. Yuz berishi mumkin bo‘lgan avariya uchun siz javobgar bo‘lasiz.
answerATarget: Ishlar menga o‘tishga imkon berguncha kutaman

questionTextSource: For which motor vehicles or combination vehicles designated or used for road haulage purposes, is it necessary to pay a user charge on federal highways?
explanationSource: For motor vehicles with a maximum authorized mass of at least 7.5 t and combinations of vehicles with a maximum authorized mass of at least 7.5 tons must be paid a usage fee (toll).
answerASource: For motor vehicles with a gross vehicle weight rating of at least 7.5 t
answerBSource: For combination vehicles with a gross vehicle weight rating of at least 7.5 t
answerCSource: For combination vehicles with a gross vehicle weight rating less than 7.5 t
questionTextTarget: Federal avtomagistrallarda yuk tashish uchun mo‘ljallangan yoki foydalaniladigan qaysi motorli transport vositalari yoki transport birikmalari uchun foydalanish to‘lovi to‘lanishi kerak?
explanationTarget: Eng kamida 7,5 t ruxsat etilgan maksimal massaga ega motorli transport vositalari va eng kamida 7,5 t ruxsat etilgan maksimal massaga ega transport birikmalari uchun foydalanish to‘lovi, ya’ni toll to‘lanishi kerak.
answerATarget: Kamida 7,5 t ruxsat etilgan umumiy og‘irlikka ega motorli transport vositalari uchun
answerBTarget: Kamida 7,5 t ruxsat etilgan umumiy og‘irlikka ega transport birikmalari uchun
answerCTarget: 7,5 t dan kam ruxsat etilgan umumiy og‘irlikka ega transport birikmalari uchun

questionTextSource: What motor vehicles and combination vehicles are subject to a toll charge on motorways and federal highways?
explanationSource: Motor vehicles and vehicle combinations to a maximum authorized mass of at least 7.5 t have, are toll roads. The same applies to vehicles that are used for freight transport.
answerASource: - are used in road haulage operations
answerBSource: - have a gross vehicle weight rating of at least 7.5 t
answerCSource: - have at least 4 seats
questionTextTarget: Avtomagistrallar va federal yo‘llarda qaysi motorli transport vositalari va transport birikmalari toll to‘loviga tortiladi?
explanationTarget: Kamida 7,5 t ruxsat etilgan maksimal massaga ega motorli transport vositalari va transport birikmalari toll yo‘llarida to‘lovga tortiladi. Yuk tashish uchun ishlatiladigan transport vositalariga ham xuddi shu qoida amal qiladi.
answerBTarget: - kamida 7,5 t ruxsat etilgan umumiy og‘irlikka ega

questionTextSource: You are transporting hazardous goods during winter. What should you do if road conditions deteriorate due to packed snow?
explanationSource: In icy weather, you must take special care to avoid endangering others. If you reach a point where you can no longer guarantee that others will not be endangered, you should find a good place to park.
answerASource: - ensure that no-one else is endangered
answerBSource: - look for the next suitable place to stop and park, if necessary
answerCSource: - always transport hazardous goods to the destination with no intermediate stops
questionTextTarget: Qishda xavfli yuk tashiyapsiz. Qattiq qor sabab yo‘l sharoiti yomonlashsa, nima qilishingiz kerak?
explanationTarget: Muzli ob-havoda boshqalarga xavf tug‘dirmaslik uchun alohida ehtiyotkor bo‘lishingiz kerak. Agar boshqalarga xavf tug‘dirmaslikni endi kafolatlay olmasangiz, mos to‘xtash va parkovka joyini topishingiz kerak.
answerATarget: - hech kim xavf ostiga qo‘yilmasligini ta’minlash
answerBTarget: - zarur bo‘lsa, keyingi mos to‘xtash va parkovka joyini qidirish
answerCTarget: - xavfli yukni doimo oraliq to‘xtashlarsiz manzilga yetkazish

questionTextSource: You are driving an agricultural tractor at 30 km/h on a main road with a paved hard shoulder on the right. What is the right thing to do?
explanationSource: In order to continue to ensure the flow of traffic, please go possible on the shoulder of your agricultural tractor.
answerASource: I have to drive on the hard shoulder when possible
answerBSource: I may only use the hard shoulder for stopping
answerCSource: I may only use the hard shoulder briefly to allow vehicles to overtake
questionTextTarget: Siz asosiy yo‘lda o‘ng tomonda qoplangan yo‘l cheti yo‘lagi bo‘lgan joyda qishloq xo‘jaligi traktorini 30 km/soat tezlikda boshqaryapsiz. To‘g‘ri harakat nima?
explanationTarget: Harakat oqimi davom etishi uchun qishloq xo‘jaligi traktori bilan imkon qadar yo‘l cheti yo‘lagidan foydalaning.
answerATarget: Imkon bo‘lsa yo‘l cheti yo‘lagida yurishim kerak
answerBTarget: Yo‘l cheti yo‘lagidan faqat to‘xtash uchun foydalanishim mumkin
answerCTarget: Transport vositalari quvib o‘tishi uchun yo‘l cheti yo‘lagidan faqat qisqa muddat foydalanishim mumkin

questionTextSource: What risks could arise if you drive in the right-hand lane alongside a truck?
explanationSource: A truck will diminish both your visibility and other people on the road seeing you (including the driver of the truck)
answerASource: - be unseen
answerBSource: - overlook other road users
answerCSource: - get burned by the hot exhaust fumes from the truck
questionTextTarget: Yuk mashinasi yonida o‘ng yo‘lakda harakatlansangiz, qanday xavflar yuzaga kelishi mumkin?
explanationTarget: Yuk mashinasi sizning ko‘rinishingizni ham, boshqalar sizni ko‘rishini ham kamaytiradi, shu jumladan yuk mashinasi haydovchisi ham sizni ko‘rmay qolishi mumkin.
answerCTarget: - yuk mashinasining issiq chiqindi gazlaridan kuyish

questionTextSource: A large pool of water has formed on the roadway. What do you do?
explanationSource: You should drive slowly on large pools of water as there is a risk of aquaplaning.
answerASource: Drive slowly, keeping your feet on the footrests
answerBSource: Do not brake, drive through the pool with your legs raised
answerCSource: Drive along the pavement
questionTextTarget: Qatnov qismida katta suv to‘plami hosil bo‘lgan. Nima qilasiz?
explanationTarget: Katta suv to‘plamlarida sekin haydash kerak, chunki akvaplaning xavfi bor.
answerATarget: Sekin haydayman, oyoqlarimni oyoq tayanchlarida ushlab turaman
answerBTarget: Tormoz bermayman, oyoqlarimni ko‘tarib suvdan o‘taman

questionTextSource: You are driving in fog on the autobahn and have 50 m visibility. What is the maximum speed you may drive?
explanationSource: If the visibility in fog is less than 50 meters, the driver must not drive faster than 50 km/h. This also applies when there's snowfall or heavy rain.
answerASource: 50 km/h
answerBSource: 70 km/h
answerCSource: 90 km/h
questionTextTarget: Siz avtomagistralda tumanda ketyapsiz va ko‘rinish 50 m. Eng yuqori qanday tezlikda yurishingiz mumkin?
explanationTarget: Tumanda ko‘rinish 50 metrdan kam bo‘lsa, haydovchi 50 km/soatdan tez yurmasligi kerak. Bu qor yog‘ishi yoki kuchli yomg‘irda ham amal qiladi.

questionTextSource: What is the rule of thumb when calculating the braking distance for evasive braking on a dry, even and asphalted roadway?
explanationSource: The rule of thumb for determining the stopping distance is: thinking distance (speed divided by 10 times 3) plus braking distance (speed divided by 10 times speed divided by 10). At 50 km/h, this is 50 divided by 10 times 3 equals 15 m thinking distance plus 50 divided by 10 times 50 divided by 10 equals 25 m braking distance. The stopping distance is 40 m. In case of emergency braking, this value is halved. That would be 20 m in this example.
answerASource: ({Speed in km/h}/{10} x {Speed in km/h}/{10}) : 2
answerBSource: ({Speed in km/h}/{10} x 5) : 2
answerCSource: ({Speed in km/h}/{10} x 3) : 2
questionTextTarget: Quruq, tekis va asfaltlangan yo‘lda favqulodda tormozlashdagi tormoz yo‘lini hisoblash uchun oddiy qoida qanday?
explanationTarget: To‘xtash masofasi: fikrlash masofasi (tezlik/10 x 3) plus tormoz yo‘li (tezlik/10 x tezlik/10). 50 km/soatda bu 15 m fikrlash masofasi va 25 m tormoz yo‘li, jami 40 m. Favqulodda tormozlashda bu qiymat ikki baravar kamayadi, ya’ni misolda 20 m.

questionTextSource: You are travelling at 40 km/h. The braking distance for evasive braking is approximately 8 metres. How long is the braking distance at 50 km/h given otherwise the same conditions?
explanationSource: The normal braking distance of your car is determined by this rule of thumb: Speed ​​divided by 10 times speed divided by 10. To calculate the braking distance during emergency braking, the determined value is halved again (divided by 2). Here there means: 50/10 * 50/10 = 25, divided by 2 = 12.5 meters.
questionTextTarget: Siz 40 km/soat tezlikda ketyapsiz. Favqulodda tormozlashdagi tormoz yo‘li taxminan 8 metr. Boshqa sharoitlar bir xil bo‘lsa, 50 km/soatda tormoz yo‘li qancha bo‘ladi?
explanationTarget: Oddiy tormoz yo‘li qoida bo‘yicha hisoblanadi: tezlikni 10 ga bo‘lish va natijani o‘ziga ko‘paytirish. Favqulodda tormozlashda topilgan qiymat yana ikkiga bo‘linadi. Bu yerda: 50/10 * 50/10 = 25, 2 ga bo‘linsa = 12,5 metr.

questionTextSource: You are driving on a good quality road in good visibility conditions. Within what distance must you be able to stop?
explanationSource: With good visibility on a developed road, you must be able to stop within the assessable distance. At night, the range of the low beam is considered assessable.
answerASource: - the stretch of road visible to me
answerBSource: - half of the stretch of road visible to me
answerCSource: - twice the stretch of road visible to me
questionTextTarget: Yaxshi ko‘rinish sharoitida sifatli yo‘lda ketyapsiz. Qaysi masofada to‘xtay olishingiz kerak?
explanationTarget: Yaxshi ko‘rinish va yaxshi qurilgan yo‘lda siz baholay oladigan masofa ichida to‘xtay olishingiz kerak. Tunda qisqa faralar yoritadigan masofa baholay olinadigan masofa hisoblanadi.
answerCTarget: - menga ko‘rinadigan yo‘l qismining ikki baravari

questionTextSource: You are driving in darkness on a well-constructed main road, using your dipped headlights. Within what distance must you be able to stop?
explanationSource: You must be able to stop within the range of the low beam, as the parking light is so weak that it has no illumination visible to you. If you need the range of the high beam to stop, you risk a collision.
answerASource: - dipped headlights
answerBSource: - main beam lights
answerCSource: - side lights
questionTextTarget: Qorong‘ida yaxshi qurilgan asosiy yo‘lda qisqa faralar bilan ketyapsiz. Qaysi masofada to‘xtay olishingiz kerak?
explanationTarget: Qisqa faralar yoritadigan masofa ichida to‘xtay olishingiz kerak. Gabarit chiroqlari juda zaif va sizga yetarli yoritish bermaydi. Agar to‘xtash uchun uzoq faralar masofasiga muhtoj bo‘lsangiz, to‘qnashuv xavfi tug‘iladi.

questionTextSource: What must you remember particularly when driving with winter tyres (M + S)?
explanationSource: The car driver must comply with the maximum speed limit when driving with winter tires. The speed depends on the type of winter tires and may exceed 80 km/h.
answerASource: The maximum permissible speed for these tyres may not be exceeded
answerBSource: You may not drive faster than 80 km/h
answerCSource: The maximum permissible speed for cars fitted with snow chains applies
questionTextTarget: Qishki shinalar (M + S) bilan haydashda ayniqsa nimani yodda tutishingiz kerak?
explanationTarget: Qishki shinalar bilan haydashda haydovchi maksimal ruxsat etilgan tezlikka rioya qilishi kerak. Tezlik qishki shina turiga bog‘liq va 80 km/soatdan yuqori bo‘lishi mumkin.
answerATarget: Bu shinalar uchun ruxsat etilgan maksimal tezlikdan oshmaslik kerak
answerCTarget: Qor zanjiri o‘rnatilgan avtomobillar uchun maksimal tezlik amal qiladi

questionTextSource: You are driving with dipped headlights on a main road. Within what distance must you be able to stop?
explanationSource: You are only allowed to drive so fast that you can stop within the assessable track. In this situation, this corresponds to the range of your low beam.
answerASource: - dipped headlights
answerBSource: - main beam lights
answerCSource: - side lights
questionTextTarget: Qisqa faralar bilan asosiy yo‘lda ketyapsiz. Qaysi masofada to‘xtay olishingiz kerak?
explanationTarget: Siz faqat ko‘ra va baholay oladigan yo‘l qismi ichida to‘xtay oladigan tezlikda haydashingiz mumkin. Bu vaziyatda bu qisqa faralaringiz yoritadigan masofaga teng.

questionTextSource: What vehicles are subject to the recommended speed on motorways?
explanationSource: On motorways, all cars and vehicles up to a maximum gross vehicle weight of 3.5 t have to observe the freeway speed limit. Exceeding this speed limit is not recommended even in favorable traffic conditions.
answerASource: - cars
answerBSource: - motorbikes
answerCSource: - Trucks with a gross vehicle weight rating in excess of 3.5 t
questionTextTarget: Avtomagistrallardagi tavsiya etilgan tezlik qaysi transport vositalariga taalluqli?
explanationTarget: Avtomagistrallarda barcha yengil avtomobillar va maksimal umumiy og‘irligi 3,5 t gacha bo‘lgan transport vositalari tavsiya etilgan tezlikka rioya qilishi kerak. Qulay sharoitda ham bu tezlikdan oshish tavsiya etilmaydi.
answerCTarget: - umumiy og‘irligi 3,5 t dan ortiq yuk mashinalari

questionTextSource: On what roads does the recommended speed of 130 km/h apply?
explanationSource: On freeway and roads outside the city, whose lanes are structurally separated, an advisory speed limit of 130 km/h applies. However, you must keep enough distance to be able to stop any time.
answerASource: Motorways
answerBSource: On vehicle roadways not inside a built-up area, with separate carriageways for each direction
answerCSource: On vehicle roadways not inside a built-up area, with at least two marked lanes for each direction
questionTextTarget: 130 km/soat tavsiya etilgan tezlik qaysi yo‘llarda amal qiladi?
explanationTarget: Avtomagistrallarda va aholi yashash hududidan tashqaridagi yo‘llarda, agar yo‘nalishlar konstruktiv ravishda ajratilgan bo‘lsa, 130 km/soat tavsiya etilgan tezlik amal qiladi. Biroq har doim to‘xtay oladigan darajada yetarli masofa saqlashingiz kerak.
answerBTarget: Aholi yashash hududidan tashqarida, har bir yo‘nalish uchun alohida qatnov qismlari bo‘lgan yo‘llarda
answerCTarget: Aholi yashash hududidan tashqarida, har bir yo‘nalishda kamida ikki belgilangan yo‘lak bo‘lgan yo‘llarda

questionTextSource: You are driving at 80 km/h behind a motor vehicle. What is the minimum safe distance you must observe?
explanationSource: When driving behind another vehicle, you need to maintain the so-called "two-second distance" to be able to stop in time. At a speed of 80 km/h, this corresponds to about 40 meters.
answerASource: A "distance of 2 seconds"
answerBSource: A "distance of 1 second"
answerCSource: A distance of 15 metres
questionTextTarget: Siz motorli transport vositasi ortidan 80 km/soat tezlikda ketyapsiz. Minimal xavfsiz masofa qancha bo‘lishi kerak?
explanationTarget: Boshqa transport vositasi ortidan yurganda vaqtida to‘xtash uchun “ikki soniya masofasi”ni saqlashingiz kerak. 80 km/soat tezlikda bu taxminan 40 metrga teng.
